About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Your Trusted Guide to Education in Turkey
About.mission: Our mission is to bridge the gap between ambitious international students and world-class Turkish universities by providing transparent, efficient, and free placement services.
About.vision: We envision a world where every student has access to global education without administrative barriers or hidden costs.
About.valueMissionDesc: Dedicated to eliminating barriers to international education.
About.valueTransparentDesc: No hidden fees. Our placement services are 100% sponsored by universities.
About.valueStudentDesc: From application to graduation, the student's success is our core focus.
About.ctaDesc: Join thousands of international students who have successfully placed into top Turkish universities through Student Apply.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive support from application to graduation.

Turkey.title: Study in Turkey
Turkey.subtitle: A bridge between Europe and Asia, offering world-class education and rich cultural experiences.
Turkey.qualityDesc: Turkish universities are globally recognized and participate in the Bologna process.
Turkey.affordableDesc: Experience a high standard of living at a fraction of the cost of western countries.
Turkey.strategicLocationDesc: Bridging the East and West with rich cultural history.
Turkey.vibrantCultureDesc: Amazing food, welcoming people, and endless places to explore.
Turkey.citiesDesc: Discover the best cities for international students in Turkey. Each city offers a unique blend of academic excellence, rich history, and vibrant student life.
Turkey.istanbulDesc: The cultural and economic heart of Turkey, home to over 50 universities and a thriving international student community. With its rich history bridging Europe and Asia, students enjoy diverse academic environments and numerous career opportunities in a vibrant setting.
Turkey.ankaraDesc: As the political and academic capital, Ankara provides a strong academic environment with affordable living conditions. It's home to top-ranked universities known for research excellence, making it a highly sought-after destination for international students.
Turkey.izmirDesc: Located on the beautiful Aegean coast, Izmir offers a perfect balance between academic rigor and a relaxed lifestyle. Known for its welcoming atmosphere, pleasant climate, and vibrant cultural scene, it's a favorite among local and international students alike.
Turkey.eskisehirDesc: Often referred to as the 'Student City' of Turkey, Eskişehir boasts a high student satisfaction rate. It offers affordable prices, convenient transportation, and rich social activities in a very welcoming and student-centric environment.
Turkey.antalyaDesc: Famous for its stunning beaches and tourism, Antalya also hosts a growing student population. It offers low living costs, a lively cultural scene, and excellent educational institutions in a beautiful Mediterranean setting.
Turkey.noUniversitiesDesc: We couldn't find any universities listed for {city} yet.
